item.title: I'm Just a Bill: Federal Prescription Mail-Order Standards
item.description:
👀 Federal Prescription Mail-Order Standards

What

Federal prescription mail-order standards in the 119th Congress addressing rural prescription access and PBM mail-order patterns.

What it does

  • Mail-order pharmacy operational standards · rural-delivery service-level requirements · cooperative-class pharmacy provisions · PBM mail-order transparency.

Composes

Lower Costs Transparency + Rural Hospital Stabilization + #7 MSA.

🟡 Provisional. Help Each Other Help Ourselves.
